title: Sabse Bada Mujrim
overview: Sabse Bada Mujrim is an Indian Bhojpuri language film, Released in 2013, Starring Rahul Roy, Joginder Tiwari, Anand Ojha, Lovy Rohtagi, Kajal Raghwani, Rakhi Tripathi, Prem Shandilya & Prateek Shandiya, It was directed by Dhiraj Kumar.
